title.value: Planning with External Tools for Reliable Agentic Reasoning

abstract.value: We study reliable agentic reasoning with explicit planning and external tool use, improving completion on complex decision tasks.

title.value: Composable Diffusion Planning for Text-to-Image Control

abstract.value: We present a text-to-image diffusion framework with stronger compositional control, prompt planning, and efficient image editing.

title.value: Long-Horizon Video Diffusion with Motion-Aware Memory

abstract.value: This paper improves text-to-video generation with motion-aware memory for long-horizon coherence and video synthesis quality.
